Use 3 cost in blue to build up tentacles and tentacle damage, white tentacles/faros to shield as necessary. Faros grabs 3 cost as default, 0 cost if you need to reduce sacrifice stacks, strike/defend in the 0 cost is in discard, and Miryam 3 cost if all of above is in hand. Get Miryam rouse the turn before burst so it reduces to zero on burst turn. On burst turn, play Miyram rouse for vul, move to red tentacles, exalt goli for str, exalt gMurphy, spam 3 cost
If facing boss with long startup phases, build up tentacle slots with Miryam first, then burst
If facing seal, grab strike cards with faros
For mobs, you usually want to burst turn 2. Build up as much you can turn 1 and then switch to white tentacles
Do not keep Miryam’s 0 cost in hand, just use it
Put Alva wheel on faros. Then tentacle triggers in the strikes and defends are very impactful once you have enough buildup
